reviews.comment:
La mesera del Full no me devolvió mi Tarjeta ServiClub, llamé me dijeron que la tenian, obvio yo ta estaba en Capital, dijeron que la enviarían con una persona de empresa que viajaba a Bs. As., que llame al día siguiente, lo hice, me atendieron pésimo. Ni una estrella merecen además son un A.C.A. como para seguir siendo socio no.m, con tan mal atención y trato.

(Translated by Google)
The waitress at Full didn't return my ServiClub card. I called and they said they had it, but of course I was already in Buenos Aires. They said they'd send it with a company representative who was traveling there and that I should call back the next day. I did, and the service was terrible. They don't even deserve one star. Besides, they're an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), so I'm not going to continue being a member with such bad service and treatment.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZcXJlb1R3EAE
